name: local-go-links
title: Local Go Links
description: Open URLs from short aliases stored in a local JSON file. Fully local: no network calls, no sync, no account. Aliases are resolved in memory from your file at invocation time.
author: roeeyn

commands.name: open-go-link
commands.title: Open Local Go Link
commands.subtitle: Local Go Links
commands.description: Resolve an alias from your local JSON file and open the URL in your default browser. No network calls; resolution is in-memory.

preferences.name: goLinksFile
preferences.title: Go Links File
preferences.description: Path to the local JSON file that defines your go links. Re-read fresh on every invocation; no caching.
